title: 10 · Binance → DEX Lead-Lag (Pancake / Aster / Lighter / Variational)

panels.title: ${base} — cumulative return since window start (bp). Binance vs DEXes only.
panels.description: Each exchange's mid is rebased to its own first-tick value in the visible window. Binance is the lead. The horizontal gap to a DEX line at any Y level = lag in seconds.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}_USDT' AND t.timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "pancake" FROM pancake_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND t.timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "aster" FROM aster_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND t.timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}' AND t.timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "variational" FROM variational_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}' AND t.timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY t.timestamp

panels.title: ${base} — raw mid prices, Binance highlighted
panels.description: Tick-by-tick mid for Binance vs each DEX. When Binance jumps, watch how long until each DEX follows.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pancake" FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "aster" FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "variational" FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${base} — last-5-min lag stats vs Binance (avg/stddev/min/max bp dev, tick count)
panels.description: ASOF JOIN over the past 5 minutes. Higher stddev/avg of bp dev = more lag/staleness vs Binance. Lower tick count = collector starvation.

targets.rawSql: WITH bin AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), pa AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), ar AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), li AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), va AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())) SELECT 'pancake' exchange, count() ticks, round(avg((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) avg_bp, round(stddev_samp((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) stddev_bp, round(min((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) min_bp, round(max((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) max_bp FROM pa ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'aster', count(), round(avg((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM ar ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'lighter', count(), round(avg((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM li ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'variational', count(), round(avg((va.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((va.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((va.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((va.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM va ASOF JOIN bin ORDER BY stddev_bp DESC

panels.title: Top-30 widest current Binance ↔ DEX divergence across ALL coins (bp)
panels.description: Live pulse: which coin × DEX combo is showing the largest mid divergence right now. Updated every 1s. Refresh window = 60s. Auto-discovered universe.

targets.rawSql: WITH bin AS (SELECT replace(symbol,'_USDT','') base, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('s', -60, now()) AND symbol LIKE '%_USDT' GROUP BY symbol), pa AS (SELECT replace(symbol,'USDT','') base, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('s', -60, now()) AND symbol LIKE '%USDT' GROUP BY symbol), ar AS (SELECT replace(symbol,'USDT','') base, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid FROM aster_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('s', -60, now()) AND symbol LIKE '%USDT' GROUP BY symbol), li AS (SELECT symbol base, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('s', -60, now()) GROUP BY symbol), va AS (SELECT symbol base, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid FROM variational_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('s', -60, now()) GROUP BY symbol) SELECT 'pancake' dex, pa.base sym, round((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000, 2) bp_dev, round(abs((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000), 2) abs_bp FROM pa JOIN bin ON pa.base = bin.base UNION ALL SELECT 'aster', ar.base, round((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000, 2), round(abs((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000), 2) FROM ar JOIN bin ON ar.base = bin.base UNION ALL SELECT 'lighter', li.base, round((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000, 2), round(abs((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000), 2) FROM li JOIN bin ON li.base = bin.base UNION ALL SELECT 'variational', va.base, round((va.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000, 2), round(abs((va.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000), 2) FROM va JOIN bin ON va.base = bin.base ORDER BY abs_bp DESC LIMIT 30
